data.title: Celebrating 25 years of visual search innovation
data.description: <img src="https://storage.googleapis.com/gweb-uniblog-publish-prod/images/Google_Images_25th_hero.max-600x600.format-webp.webp">Google Images is turning 25. Here’s a look back at some major milestones — and new ways to explore and create visual content.
data.author: <name>Brad Kellett</name><title>Senior Engineering Director</title><department>Search</department><company/>
